Class Proposal

java.lang.Object
whistapp.domain.bids.Bid
whistapp.domain.bids.Proposal
Direct Known Subclasses:
ProposalAlone, ProposalWithPartner
public abstract class Proposal extends Bid
Represents a Proposal bid (8 tricks with a specified suit)

  • Constructor Details

    • Proposal

      public Proposal(ArrayList<Player> declarers) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException

  • Method Details

    • getTricksWonByTeam

      protected int getTricksWonByTeam(HashMap<Player,Integer> tricksWon)
      Calculates the COMBINED tricks won by the entire bidding team. This naturally handles both 1-player (Solo) and 2-player (Accepted) proposals.
      Parameters:
      tricksWon - The number of tricks won by each player.
      Returns:
      The number of tricks won by the declarers.

    • calculateBaseScore

      protected int calculateBaseScore(int tricksWonByTeam, int numberOfTricksNeeded)
      Calculates the base score value of the contract. Subclasses will call this, and then distribute this score to the players.
      Parameters:
      tricksWonByTeam - The number of tricks won by the declarers.
      numberOfTricksNeeded - The number of tricks needed to win the bid.
      Returns:
      The base score value of the contract.

    • isTeamSuccessful

      protected boolean isTeamSuccessful(int tricksWonByTeam, int numberOfTricksNeeded)
      Helper method to check if the declarers won the bid.
      Parameters:
      tricksWonByTeam - The number of tricks won by the declarers.
      numberOfTricksNeeded - The number of tricks needed to win the bid.
      Returns:
      True if the declarers won, False otherwise.
